---
pagetitle: Blog | FishMIP
description-meta: |
    Welcome to the FishMIP blog!

listing: 
- id: blog
  contents: 
    - "../blogs/*qmd"
    - "!../blogs/dummy-blog-post.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: false
  image-placeholder: "../blogs/images/bannerphoto.jpeg"
---

::: {.column-screen style="margin-top: -2.9em;"}
![](../images/shutterstock_169126697%20(4).jpeg){.banner fig-align="center"}
:::

# Welcome to the FishMIP Blog!

::: {#blog}

:::
